name: Demons and Demon Slayers
description:
\\ Peace in the Mountains //
This is a scene where the demon slayers and demons are having a peace day, they're in a small mountain area with leaves covering the top, a hot spring and a hut that everyone is sleeping in.
Hashira: Sanemi, Gyomei, Rengoku, Tengen, Shinobu, Tomioka, Muichiro, Mitsuri, and Obanai
Demon Slayers: Inosuke, Tanjiro, Nezuko, Zenitsu, Genya, Kanao, and Aoi
Upper Moons: Kokushibo, Douma, Akaza, Hantengu (Hantengu clones: Sekido (anger), Karaku (pleasure), Aizetsu (sadness), Urogi (joy)), Nakime, Gyokko, Daki, Gyutaro, Kaigaku.
Lower Moons: Enmu and Rui

Also I didn't Code in Muzan, Aoi, Kaigaku, Enmu, Rui, and Hantengu + his clones because there were so many tokens ;-;
creator: Moonlit_night123
